items.title: 在Nvidia最新的下跌之后，以下两只增长股值得购买。

items.title: Anthropic被美国国防部选为人工智能合作伙伴，如今却被禁用，专家们开始担忧。
items.summary: Anthropic与亚马逊和帕拉提尔的合作帮助其在DOD取得了进展，但其被列入黑名单引起了许多行业专家的关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried
items.summary_en: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.

items.title: OpenAI将收购安全性初创公司Promptfoo以更好地保护AI代理
items.summary: Promptfoo团队将加入Sam Altman领导的OpenAI，技术将整合到AI代理平台Frontier中。
items.title_en: OpenAI to buy cybersecurity startup Promptfoo to better safeguard AI agents
items.summary_en: Promptfoo's team will join Sam Altman-led OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the Frontier platform for AI agents.

items.title: 惠普股价上涨，收益受益于两个大趋势的AI
items.summary: 该公司提高了网络收入的预期，并披露了企业AI服务器订单大幅增加。
items.title_en: HPE’s stock rises as earnings benefit from two big AI trends
items.summary_en: The company lifted its outlook for networking revenue and disclosed a big bump in orders for enterprise AI servers.

items.title: 微软推出高价 Office 等级，Copilot作为其试图通过 AI 增强销售的努力
items.summary: 微软365E7包含Copilot，以及身份、管理和安全功能，这些功能可能会让更多的企业采用AI。
items.title_en: Microsoft adds higher-priced Office tier with Copilot as it tries to juice sales with AI
items.summary_en: Microsoft 365 E7 comes with Copilot, as well as identity, management and security features that might make more businesses adopt AI.

items.title: 英伟达支持AI数据中心初创公司Nscale，后者估值达14.6亿美元
items.summary: NScale已成为人工智能基础设施建设中的关键玩家。
items.title_en: Nvidia backs AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6 billion valuation
items.summary_en: Nscale has become a key player in the AI infrastructure buildout

items.title: 阿瑟·海斯表示，美国国债收益率上升可能会触发货币印刷式救援，并"有利于"比特币。
items.title_en: Arthur Hayes Says Rising Treasury Yields Could Trigger A Money-Printing Bailout And 'Benefit' Bitcoin+

items.title: 中国消费者通胀率达三年高点，生产者通胀率缓解
items.summary: 中国的消费价格指数（CPI）在三个多年来首次出现了大幅上涨，长假期间的消费热潮推动了消费支出。
items.title_en: China consumer inflation hits three-year high as producer deflation eases
items.summary_en: China's consumer inflation recorded the biggest jump in more than three years, as an extended holiday bolstered spending.

items.title: 特朗普称伊朗战争将很快结束，预测油价将下降
items.summary: 美国股市指数在白天一度上涨，据初步报告，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示他认为伊朗战争已经基本结束。
items.title_en: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices
items.summary_en: U.S. stock market indexes rose earlier in the day after an initial report that President Donald Trump said he believed the Iran war was largely finished.

items.title: 特朗普宣布对伊朗实施制裁缓解措施，称伊朗战争将在“很快”结束。
items.summary: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，为了缓解原油价格，美国将豁免某些国家的石油相关制裁，他估计与伊朗的战争将很快结束。
items.title_en: Trump announces sanctions relief to ease oil prices, says Iran war to end ‘very soon’
items.summary_en: President Donald Trump said the U.S. is waiving oil-related sanctions on certain countries in an effort to ease crude prices, as he estimated the war with Iran would end “very soon.”

items.title: 春季旅游旺季已经变得混乱不堪，正与伊朗冲突的影响相撞。
items.summary: 美国人原本以为春假能带来一段放松的时光，但可能会有一个不太愉快的惊喜。
items.title_en: An already chaotic spring travel season is colliding with effects of Iran conflict
items.summary_en: Americans who thought spring break would offer rest and relaxation after a tough winter may be in for a rude awakening.

items.title: 第七名美国服役人员在伊朗战争中被杀的士兵被确认为是上士本杰明·彭宁顿（Sgt. Benjamin Pennington）。
items.summary: 肯塔基州格伦代尔的26岁男子Pennington在3月1日沙特阿拉伯的普里ンス·苏丹空军基地遭到伊朗袭击时受伤，于周日去世。
items.title_en: Seventh U.S. service member killed in Iran war identified as Sgt. Benjamin Pennington
items.summary_en: Pennington, 26, from Glendale, Kentucky, was wounded on March 1 during an Iranian strike at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. He died on Sunday.

items.title: 美国国债收益率停止攀升，据报道特朗普表示伊朗战争可能很快结束
items.summary: 2年期国债收益率周一上涨，受通胀担忧和石油价格大幅上涨的影响。
items.title_en: Treasury yields halt climb after Trump reportedly signals Iran war may end soon
items.summary_en: The yield on the 2-year Treasury note had been rising Monday on inflation fears after oil prices surged.

items.title: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能对另一个能源市场造成更大的打击。
items.summary: 全球液化天然气约有20%通过海峡。
items.title_en: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary_en: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.

items.title: 石油价格下跌，接近$120后，特朗普表示美国考虑控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary: 阿拉伯海湾石油生产国正在减少产量，因为他们已经没有存储空间了，因为无法通过霍尔木兹海峡出口石油。
items.title_en: Oil prices decline after nearly hitting $120 as Trump says U.S. considering taking over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_en: Gulf Arab oil producers are cutting production as they run out of storage space because they can't export through the Strait of Hormuz

items.title: 10年期国债收益率下跌，随着石油价格反弹
items.summary: 10年期国债收益率最初上升，然后在周一回落，因为原油价格先升破100美元一桶，后又下跌。
items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yield falls as oil reverses spike
items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield initially moved higher before pulling back on Monday as oil prices at first moved past $100 a barrel, then later declined.

items.title: 油价飙升至100美元，人们开始担心会出现1970年代式的通货膨胀加失业。这种威胁有多大?
items.summary: 高通胀和缓慢增长构成了双重威胁，降息和政府开支等措施只会加剧通胀。
items.title_en: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?
items.summary_en: High inflation and slow growth present a double threat, as measures like interest rate cuts and government spending only aggravate inflation.

items.title: G7能源部长将于周二上午举行会议，讨论释放石油储备。
items.summary: 石油价格突破每桶100美元，伊朗威胁关闭霍尔木兹海峡导致该海峡关闭。
items.title_en: G7 energy ministers to meet Tuesday morning to discuss release of oil reserves, sources say
items.summary_en: Oil prices surged above $100 per barrel as the critical Strait of Hormuz remains closed due to threats from Iran.

items.title: 伊朗战略性石油岛屿因中东冲突升级而走红
items.summary: 卡尔吉斯岛是伊朗石油业的核心地带，占伊朗原油出口的约90%。
items.title_en: Iran's strategic oil island thrust into the spotlight as Middle East conflict escalates
items.summary_en: Kharg Island serves as the centerpiece for Iran's oil industry, accounting for roughly 90% of the country’s crude exports.

items.title: 伊朗外交部警告称，通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮“必须非常小心”。
items.summary: 石油原油价格大幅上涨，因为伊朗被美国和以色列发动战争后，霍尔木兹海峡实际上已经被封锁。
items.title_en: Oil tankers transiting Strait of Hormuz 'must be very careful,' Iran Foreign Ministry warns
items.summary_en: The price of crude oil has sharply spiked as the Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed as the United States and Israel wage war on Iran.

items.title: 欧洲市场收盘下跌，油价大幅上涨受中东局势影响
items.summary: 欧洲股市在新一周的交易开始时大幅下跌，投资者密切关注中东局势和油价大幅上涨。
items.title_en: European markets close lower as oil price surges amid Middle East turmoil
items.summary_en: European stocks started the new trading week sharply lower as traders tracked developments in the Middle East and a surge in oil prices.

items.title: 预测市场面临伊朗战争赌注的质疑，包括政权更迭到核爆炸。
items.summary: 预测市场因与战争相关的赌注而面临反弹，Polymarket最近将一些核爆炸预测存档。
items.title_en: Prediction markets face questions on Iran war bets, from regime change to nuclear detonation
items.summary_en: Prediction markets are facing backlash over bets related to war, with Polymarket recently archiving some predictions on nuclear detonation.

items.title: 分析师警告：石油价格可能进一步上涨

items.summary_en: Energy analysts warned that oil prices could continue to rise in response to the war in the Middle East.

items.title: 美国伊朗战争是历史上最大的一次石油供应干扰
items.summary: 全球石油市场将需要通过石油价格大幅上涨来平衡需求，Rapidan Energy表示。
items.title_en: The U.S.-Iran war is the biggest oil supply disruption in history
items.summary_en: The global oil market will need to balance by destroying demand through sharply rising oil prices, according to Rapidan Energy.

items.title: 国会民主党人要求俄罗斯石油销售到印度的逆转，随着能源价格飙升
items.summary: 俄罗斯据报正在帮助伊朗针对中东的美军，并可能从新油气销售中受益。

items.summary: 英格兰银行在伊朗战争爆发前预计将于3月或4月降息。经济学家说，不要这样认为。
items.title_en: The Iran war has put the brakes on the next Bank of England rate cut
items.summary_en: Before the war in Iran erupted, the Bank of England was widely predicted to be set to cut interest rates in March or April. Don't count on it, economists say.
